Description: List of renewable technologies for which custom time series data is used. Leave empty ``[]`` to use default data.
If true, custom electricity demand data is used instead of the built-in dataset.
If true, custom heat demand data is used instead of the built-in dataset.
If true, custom industry demand data is used instead of the built-in dataset.
If true, a custom industry database is used instead of the built-in dataset.
If true, custom transport demand data is used instead of the built-in dataset.
If true, custom water cost data is used instead of the built-in dataset.
If true, custom hydrogen underground storage data is used instead of the built-in dataset.
If true, existing capacities are added from custom data.
If true, custom sector data is used.
If true, a custom gas network CSV must be placed at ``resources/custom_data/pipelines.csv``. If false, the user can choose between greenfield or model built-in datasets.
If true, a custom export ports CSV must be placed at ``data/custom/export_ports.csv``.
If true, a custom airports CSV must be placed at ``data/custom/airports.csv``. Data format must match the airports.csv file in the data folder.
